CHAMP-CHAMP.aromaPrinciple: [sine][yellow]I have never lost. I will never lose. [jitter]I cannot lose.[/jitter][/yellow][/sine]
CHAMP-CHAMP.cardsModifierDescription: Champ cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
CHAMP-CHAMP.description:
The undisputed King of the Arena.
Has never lost a match.[fly_in][/fly_in]
CHAMP-CHAMP.eventDeathPrevention: The Champ does not fall. Not here. Not ever.
CHAMP-CHAMP.goldMonologue: [sine]Prize money... the crowd always pays well...[/sine]
CHAMP-CHAMP.title: The Champ
